definition: A team; a group of people who work together professionally.
example: We need to understand the concept of company.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm công ty.

definition: A business partnership; the name under which it trades.
example: We need to understand the concept of firm.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm doanh nghiệp.

definition: A body corporate, created by law or under authority of law, having a continuous existence independent of the existences of its members, and powers and liabilities distinct from those of its members.
example: We need to understand the concept of corporation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm công ty.

definition: A company, business, organization, or other purposeful endeavor.
example: A micro-enterprise is defined as a business having 5 or fewer employees and a low seed capital.
exampleVi: Doanh nghiệp siêu nhỏ được định nghĩa là doanh nghiệp có từ 5 nhân viên trở xuống và có vốn ban đầu thấp.

definition: A specific commercial enterprise or establishment.
example: I was left my father's business.
exampleVi: Tôi đã rời bỏ công việc kinh doanh của cha tôi.

definition: The exchange or buying and selling of commodities; especially the exchange of merchandise, on a large scale, between different places or communities; extended trade or traffic.
example: We need to understand the concept of commerce.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thương mại.

definition: Buying and selling of goods and services on a market.
example: We need to understand the concept of trade.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thương mại.

definition: The tendency to work persistently. Diligence.
example: Over the years, their industry and business sense made them wealthy.
exampleVi: Qua nhiều năm, kỹ năng công nghiệp và ý thức kinh doanh đã giúp họ trở nên giàu có.

definition: A gathering of people for the purchase and sale of merchandise at a set time, often periodic.
example: The privilege to hold a weekly market was invaluable for any feudal era burgh.
exampleVi: Đặc quyền được tổ chức phiên chợ hàng tuần là vô giá đối với bất kỳ thành phố nào ở thời phong kiến.

definition: A commodity offered for sale.
example: That store offers a variety of products.  We've got to sell a lot of product by the end of the month.
exampleVi: Cửa hàng đó cung cấp nhiều loại sản phẩm.  Chúng ta phải bán được nhiều sản phẩm vào cuối tháng.

definition: An act of being of assistance to someone.
example: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.
exampleVi: Tôi nói rằng tôi đã giúp ích cho anh ấy bằng cách chấm dứt mối quan hệ của chúng tôi - giờ anh ấy có thể tự do theo đuổi sự nghiệp của mình.

definition: A patron, a client; one who purchases or receives a product or service from a business or merchant, or intends to do so.
example: Every person who passes by is a potential customer.
exampleVi: Mỗi người đi ngang qua đều là khách hàng tiềm năng.

definition: A customer, a buyer or receiver of goods or services.
example: We need to understand the concept of client.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khách hàng.

definition: A person or organization against whom one is competing.
example: We need to understand the concept of competitor.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đối thủ cạnh tranh.

definition: The science and art of military command as applied to the overall planning and conduct of warfare.
example: We need to understand the concept of strategy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chiến lược.

definition: A drawing showing technical details of a building, machine, etc., with unwanted details omitted, and often using symbols rather than detailed drawing to represent doors, valves, etc.
example: The plans for many important buildings were once publicly available.
exampleVi: Kế hoạch của nhiều tòa nhà quan trọng đã từng được công bố rộng rãi.

definition: A result that one is attempting to achieve.
example: My lifelong goal is to get into a Hollywood movie.
exampleVi: Mục tiêu cả đời của tôi là được tham gia một bộ phim Hollywood.

definition: A butt or mark to shoot at, as for practice, or to test the accuracy of a firearm, or the force of a projectile.
example: Take careful aim at the target.
exampleVi: Hãy cẩn thận nhắm vào mục tiêu.

definition: Total income or cash flow minus expenditures. The money or other benefit a non-governmental organization or individual receives in exchange for products and services sold at an advertised price.
example: We need to understand the concept of profit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lợi nhuận.

definition: The result of no longer possessing an object, a function, or a characteristic due to external causes or misplacement.
example: In other areas, glacier loss creates serious risk of a dry period across the Third Pole, Wang said.
exampleVi: Wang cho biết ở các khu vực khác, việc mất sông băng tạo ra nguy cơ nghiêm trọng về thời kỳ khô hạn trên khắp Cực thứ ba.

definition: The woody part of a tree arising from the trunk and usually dividing.
example: We need to understand the concept of branch.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhánh.

definition: The military installation from which troops are commanded and orders are issued; the military unit consisting of a commander and his support staff.
example: We need to understand the concept of headquarters.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trụ sở chính.

definition: The purchase of one company by another; a merger without the formation of a new company, especially where some stakeholders in the purchased company oppose the purchase.
example: We need to understand the concept of takeover.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiếp quản.

definition: Someone or something, especially, a television station, that is associated with a larger, related organization, such as a television network; a member of a group of associated things.
example: Our local TV channel is an affiliate of NBC.
exampleVi: Kênh truyền hình địa phương của chúng tôi là một chi nhánh của NBC.

definition: An economic condition in which a small number of sellers exert control over the market of a commodity.
example: We need to understand the concept of oligopoly.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm độc quyền nhóm.

definition: The state of being a proprietor; ownership
example: We need to understand the concept of proprietorship.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sở hữu.

definition: The act or process of starting a process or machine.
example: We need to understand the concept of startup.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khởi nghiệp.

definition: Section
example: We need to understand the concept of sector.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ngành.

definition: A company owned by a parent company or a holding company, also called daughter company or sister company.
example: We need to understand the concept of subsidiary.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm công ty con.

definition: A risky or daring undertaking or journey.
example: We need to understand the concept of venture.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mạo hiểm.

definition: A maneuver, or action calculated to achieve some end.
example: We need to understand the concept of tactic.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chiến thuật.

exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ nhiệm vụ.

definition: A competitor (person, team, company, etc.) with the same goal as another, or striving to attain the same thing. Defeating a rival may be a primary or necessary goal of a competitor.
example: Chris is my biggest rival in the 400-metre race.
exampleVi: Chris là đối thủ lớn nhất của tôi trong cuộc đua 400 mét.

definition: The act or process of acquiring.
example: The acquisition of sports equipment can be fun in itself.
exampleVi: Bản thân việc mua lại thiết bị thể thao có thể rất thú vị.

definition: A situation, by legal privilege or other agreement, in which solely one party (company, cartel etc.) exclusively provides a particular product or service, dominating that market and generally exerting powerful control over it.
example: We need to understand the concept of monopoly.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm độc quyền.

definition: The state of being associated with a partner.
example: We need to understand the concept of partnership.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hợp tác.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word expand.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ mở rộng.

definition: A measure for something; a means of deriving a quantitative measurement or approximation for otherwise qualitative phenomena (especially used in engineering).
example: How to measure marketing? Use these key metrics for measuring marketing effectiveness.
exampleVi: Làm thế nào để đo lường tiếp thị? Sử dụng các số liệu chính này để đo lường hiệu quả tiếp thị.

definition: A pointer or index that indicates something.
example: We need to understand the concept of indicator.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chỉ báo.

definition: The act of performing; carrying into execution or action; execution; achievement; accomplishment; representation by action.
example: the performance of an undertaking or a duty
exampleVi: việc thực hiện một cam kết hoặc một nghĩa vụ

definition: That which is produced or occurs as a result of an event or process.
example: A quality automobile is the outcome of the work of skilled engineers and thousands of workers.
exampleVi: Một chiếc ô tô chất lượng là thành quả lao động của những kỹ sư lành nghề và hàng nghìn công nhân.

definition: The method by which a device performs its function.
example: We need to understand the concept of operations.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hoạt động.

definition: A multinational company.
example: We need to understand the concept of multinational.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đa quốc gia.

definition: A stone milepost (or by extension in other materials), one of a series of numbered markers placed along a road at regular intervals, typically at the side of the road or in a median.
example: We need to understand the concept of milestone.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cột mốc.

definition: The tangible end product; that which will be delivered.
example: Due to inclement weather, we will be unable to provide our deliverables.
exampleVi: Do thời tiết khắc nghiệt, chúng tôi sẽ không thể cung cấp hàng hóa.

definition: The right to vote at a public election or referendum; see: suffrage, suffragette.
example: We need to understand the concept of franchise.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhượng quyền thương mại.

definition: A cluster of heterogeneous things.
example: We need to understand the concept of conglomerate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tập đoàn.

definition: A group of individuals or companies formed to transact some specific business, or to promote a common interest; a self-coordinating group.
example: a gambling syndicate

definition: The transfer of a company or organization from government to private ownership and control.
example: We need to understand the concept of privatization.
